title: Crypto Brief — 12 May 2026
intro:

Digital assets retreated across the board Monday, with Bitcoin declining 1.13% to $80,807 as institutional flows remained muted. The ETH/BTC spread widened 151 basis points favoring Bitcoin, signaling continued flight-to-quality dynamics within crypto allocations. sections.heading: Overview
sections.content:
Crypto Markets — Session Overview

Digital assets retreated across the board Monday, with Bitcoin declining 1.13% to $80,807 as institutional flows remained muted. The ETH/BTC spread widened 151 basis points favoring Bitcoin, signaling continued flight-to-quality dynamics within crypto allocations. Correlation with traditional risk assets persisted as macro uncertainty weighs on sentiment.

Bitcoin — Dominant Narrative

Bitcoin consolidated below the $81,000 resistance level, testing weekly support near $80,500. The 7-day decline of 0.76% suggests sideways consolidation rather than trend reversal. Institutional cu

sections.heading: Analysis
sections.content:
stody flows indicate accumulation at current levels, with whale addresses adding approximately 2,400 BTC over the weekend. Key support remains at $79,200.

Ethereum and DeFi

Ethereum underperformed with a 2.64% decline to $2,278, pressured by Layer 2 value capture concerns. Staking yields compressed to 3.2% as validator count peaked. DeFi TVL remained stable at $47B, though protocol revenues declined 8% week-over-week across major platforms.

Altcoins — Capital Rotation

Solana emerged as the weekly outperformer, gaining 6.59% to $95.02 on ecosystem development momentum. Traditional L1s including Cardano and Aval

sections.heading: Outlook
sections.content:
anche showed modest weekly gains despite session weakness. XRP consolidated above $1.40 amid regulatory clarity expectations.

On-chain and Sentiment

Fear & Greed Index dropped to 34 (Fear), while funding rates turned negative across perpetual markets. Liquidations totaled $89M, primarily concentrated in altcoin longs.

Trade Ideas

LONG: Solana (ecosystem momentum), BNB (exchange token strength), Zcash (privacy narrative)
SHORT/AVOID: Ethereum (L2 headwinds), Dogecoin (meme fatigue)

Risks

Macro policy uncertainty, regulatory overhang in major jurisdictions, potential ETF outflows amid institutional rebalancing.
